_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to tailor technical and planning information to a customer’s level of understanding.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who generate and consume data and technical stakeholders who store and process it.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.560), DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.538).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.414). Shared vocabulary: [ability, technical]. DCWF-only terms [customer, information, level, planning, s, tailor] vs WIDAI-only terms [bridge, business, consume, data, effective, generate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.882, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Ability to tailor technical and planning information to a customer’s level of un" and "Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who genera" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.589 > STS 0.414 (gap +0.175). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [ability, technical]. DCWF-only: [customer, information, level, planning, s, tailor]. WIDAI-only: [bridge, business, consume, data, effective, generate].

signals.detail: STS 0.414 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.175 with low STS 0.414. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
